This project is a Next.js app using TypeScript and implements SimpleWebAuthn for passkey-based registration and authentication. 
Prioritize best practices for security and user experience when generating code for passkey flows.
This is a demo project where the focus is on implementing passkey authentication, so avoid adding unnecessary features or complexity.
When generating code, ensure that it adheres to the latest standards for web authentication and follows the SimpleWebAuthn documentation closely.
When providing code suggestions, ensure that they are compatible with the latest version of Next.js and TypeScript.

This app will be integrated with android app for passkey authentication, so consider how the web and mobile components will interact, especially the authentication flows.
